_description: Mac Mini (Apple Silicon) — MLX-LM backend. Merge the 'mlx-lm-mac-mini' block into your base models.json providers object, or use as a standalone models.json on the Mac Mini itself.
_notes: mlx_lm.server serves one model at a time — restart to switch models.
Mixed fleet (PC/Laptop on Ollama + Mac Mini on MLX): merge mlx-lm-mac-mini into your base models.json providers.
Single Mac Mini only: use this file directly as ~/.pi/agent/models.json.
Embeddings: keep Ollama running only for nomic-embed-text (1.5 GB).

models.name: Llama 3.3 70B 4-bit (MLX)
models._notes: Deep reasoning and architecture review — ~38 GB unified memory

models.name: Codestral 22B 4-bit (MLX)
models._notes: Strong EU coding model — ~12 GB unified memory

models.name: Command R 35B 4-bit (MLX)
models._notes: RAG-heavy tasks, 128K context — ~19 GB unified memory

models.name: Nomic Embed Text (Mac Mini)
models._notes: Keep Ollama for embeddings only — 1.5 GB, no MLX-native replacement needed
